name: password-length-validation
description: User story for password length validation (6-30 chars), testing EP and BVA coverage

input.story: As a user, I want to set a password between 6 and 30 characters so that my account is secure but memorable.
criteria: Password with 6 characters is accepted (minimum boundary)
Password with 30 characters is accepted (maximum boundary)
Password with 5 characters is rejected (below minimum)
Password with 31 characters is rejected (above maximum)
Password with 12 characters is accepted (valid range middle value)
